raw_text:
2026-05-01
- Repotted the basil plant on the windowsill
- Fixed the squeaky hinge on the back door
- Watched a thunderstorm roll in from the porch

2026-05-02
- Morning run along the river path
- Bought fresh strawberries at the farmers market
- Video call with my brother about the trip

2026-05-03
- The dishwasher started leaking under the sink
- Read three chapters of the detective novel
- Tried a new coffee blend from the roastery

2026-05-04
- Dentist cleaning appointment downtown
- Picked up a package from the post office
- Made a big pot of lentil soup

2026-05-05
- Заказал новые наушники в интернете
- Long bike ride to the lighthouse
- The neighbour's dog barked all evening

2026-05-06
- Planted tomato seedlings in the garden bed
- Conference call with the design team
- Burned the first batch of cookies

2026-05-07
- Свозил кота к ветеринару на прививку
- Cleaned out the garage shelves
- Finished knitting the blue scarf

2026-05-08
- Train ride to the coast for the weekend
- Lost my umbrella on the platform
- Dinner of grilled fish by the harbour

2026-05-09
- Swam in the cold sea early in the morning
- Sketched the old fishing boats
- Bought postcards for the family

2026-05-10
- Power outage lasted most of the afternoon
- Played board games by candlelight
- The fridge defrosted and made a mess

2026-05-11
- Прочитал статью о глубоководных рыбах
- Repaired the bicycle brakes
- Cooked a curry from scratch

2026-05-12
- Job interview over video call
- Bought a houseplant for the kitchen
- Heavy rain flooded the courtyard

2026-05-13
- Visited grandma at the care home
- The car wouldn't start in the parking lot
- Baked sourdough bread for the first time

2026-05-14
- Took the kids to the science museum
- A bee stung me in the garden
- Watched a film about polar expeditions

2026-05-15
- Assembled the new bookshelf from the flat-pack
- Donated old clothes to the charity shop
- Made pesto with the windowsill basil

2026-05-16
- Early flight delayed by three hours
- Wrote postcards in the airport lounge
- Tried sushi at a place near the gate

2026-05-17
- Fixed a bug in the budgeting spreadsheet
- Long phone call with an old school friend
- Grilled vegetables on the balcony

2026-05-18
- The washing machine flooded the bathroom
- Started learning the ukulele
- Picked wild blackberries on the trail

2026-05-19
- Annual eye exam at the clinic
- Re-read a favourite childhood book
- Cooked a mushroom risotto for friends
